title: Present Simple
explanation_en: Use the Present Simple for habits, routines and facts. Add -s or -es to the verb with he, she or it. Use do not or does not for negative sentences.
explanation_zh: 現在簡單式用來表示習慣、日常活動和事實。主語是 he、she 或 it 時，動詞通常加 -s 或 -es。否定句使用 do not 或 does not。

structure.learning_objective_en: I can use the Present Simple to talk about habits, routines and facts.
structure.learning_objective_zh: 我能運用現在簡單式說明習慣、日常活動和事實。
structure.positive: Subject + base verb. / He, She or It + verb-s.
structure.negative: Subject + do not/does not + base verb.
structure.question: Do/Does + subject + base verb?

spelling_rules.rule: Add -s with he, she or it.
Add -es after ch, sh, s, x or o.
Use does not with he, she or it.
Use the base verb after do or does.

examples.english: I usually eat breakfast at 7 o'clock.
examples.reason_cn: 用來表示習慣性的動作。

examples.english: She always does her homework after school.
examples.chinese: 她總是在放學後做功課。
examples.reason_cn: 表示經常發生的習慣行為。

examples.english: We play football every weekend.
examples.reason_cn: 表示固定時間的活動。

examples.english: He never drinks fizzy drinks.
examples.reason_cn: 表示習慣性的否定行為。

examples.english: My mother cooks dinner every evening.
examples.reason_cn: 表示每天固定時間的習慣。

examples.english: They sometimes go to the park after school.
examples.chinese: 他們有時放學後去公園。
examples.reason_cn: 表示偶爾發生的習慣行為。

examples.english: I don't watch TV on weekdays.
examples.reason_cn: 表示習慣性的否定行為和固定時間。

examples.english: She often reads books before bed.
examples.reason_cn: 表示頻繁發生的習慣行為。

examples.english: We go to school every day.
examples.reason_cn: 表示每天固定的習慣。

examples.english: He seldom eats sweets.
examples.reason_cn: 表示不常發生的習慣行為。

examples.english: My father works on Mondays.
examples.reason_cn: 表示固定時間的事實。

examples.english: I always brush my teeth in the morning.
examples.reason_cn: 表示習慣性的日常行為。

examples.english: They usually play basketball after school.
examples.chinese: 他們通常放學後打籃球。
examples.reason_cn: 表示經常發生的習慣行為。

examples.english: She doesn't like to eat vegetables.
examples.reason_cn: 表示習慣性的否定。

examples.english: We sometimes visit our grandparents on Sundays.
examples.chinese: 我們有時在星期天拜訪祖父母。
examples.reason_cn: 表示偶爾發生的習慣行為和固定時間。

examples.english: I never forget my homework.
examples.reason_cn: 表示習慣性的否定行為。

examples.english: She always helps her little brother.
examples.chinese: 她總是幫助她的小弟弟。
examples.reason_cn: 表示經常發生的習慣行為。

examples.english: We don't play video games every day.
examples.chinese: 我們不是每天玩電子遊戲。
examples.reason_cn: 表示習慣性的否定和頻率。

examples.english: He usually wakes up early.
examples.reason_cn: 表示經常發生的習慣行為。

examples.english: My sister reads books every morning.
examples.reason_cn: 表示每天固定時間的習慣。

examples.english: They often go swimming on weekends.
examples.reason_cn: 表示頻繁發生的習慣行為和固定時間。

examples.english: I sometimes help my parents with housework.
examples.reason_cn: 表示偶爾發生的習慣行為。

examples.english: She doesn't watch cartoons every evening.
examples.chinese: 她不是每天晚上看卡通。
examples.reason_cn: 表示習慣性的否定和頻率。

examples.english: We always clean our room on Saturdays.
examples.chinese: 我們總是在星期六打掃房間。
examples.reason_cn: 表示經常發生的習慣行為和固定時間。

examples.english: He never forgets to feed the dog.
examples.reason_cn: 表示習慣性的否定行為。

examples.english: I usually walk to school.
examples.reason_cn: 表示經常發生的習慣行為。

examples.english: They don't eat breakfast on weekdays.
examples.reason_cn: 表示習慣性的否定和固定時間。

examples.english: My brother often plays the piano.
examples.reason_cn: 表示頻繁發生的習慣行為。

examples.english: She sometimes goes to bed late.
examples.reason_cn: 表示偶爾發生的習慣行為。

examples.english: We always have lunch at noon.
examples.chinese: 我們總是在中午吃午餐。
examples.reason_cn: 表示經常發生的習慣行為。

optional_extension.title: Frequency Words
optional_extension.explanation_en: Frequency words tell us how often something happens.
optional_extension.explanation_zh: 頻率詞告訴我們事情多久發生一次。

examples.english: always
usually
sometimes
never

quiz.question: Which word shows a regular habit?
We ___ breakfast at seven every morning.

practice.question: I ___ (walk) to school every day.
She ___ (read) before bed.
Tom ___ (watch) TV after dinner.
Amy ___ (study) English on Mondays.
We ___ (play) football every weekend.
Dad ___ dinner every evening.
They ___ to school every day.
She ___ milk.
___ Ben play the piano?
We ___ watch TV on weekdays.
Change to negative: He plays basketball after school.
Change to negative: We eat breakfast at seven.
Change to a question: Amy walks to school.
Change to a question: They visit Grandma on Sundays.
Put in order: always / I / my teeth / brush
Put in order: every day / does / read / she / ?
Correct the sentence: He play football every week.
Correct the sentence: She doesn't likes vegetables.
Correct the sentence: Does Tom walks to school?
Translate into English: 我每天做家課。

answer_key.answer: He doesn't play basketball after school.
We don't eat breakfast at seven.
Do they visit Grandma on Sundays?
I do my homework every day.
